subcodes.title: Khoekhoegowab: ≠GAI-≠GUITE
subcodes.first_line:
## Khoekhoegowab: ≠GAI-≠GUITE

Ti Elotse, ≠gai-≠guite, é soutere, é !ná-!ná ti !nas ti ≠gaob dita. Elo geise ra !ná /gam
subcodes.notes: Theory: Khoekhoegowab unity prayer (section GAI-GUITE = Unity) -- "Ti Elotse, gai-guite, e soutere, e na-na ti nas ti gaob dita." = "O my God, unite us, protect us, gather us..." Possibly BH10505 (unity prayer) or similar. Challenge: Khoisan click consonants make machine matching impossible.
